rationale: Review 1's sole finding rests on a claim — that the PR description promises to discharge a Mathlib TODO about `HopfAlgebra.antipodeAlgHom` — that simply does not appear anywhere in the diff; acting on it would add out-of-scope content to fix a non-existent promise. Review 2 correctly approves at the right generality level, and its assessment of the bialgebra/Hopf split in the variable blocks is accurate.
